## Source

## Interface Surface

- Request shape updates:
- Response shape updates:

## Backend Contract Notes

## Execution Brief
- Update or add frontend API service methods.
- Update request and response types.
- Remove obsolete client-side derivations where backend now provides fields.
- Update UI state handling (loading, error, empty, success).
- Add or update tests.

## Frontend Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Frontend consumes the latest backend contract correctly.
- [ ] Impacted screens render expected data and states.
- [ ] No regressions in loading, error, or empty states.
- [ ] Tests are updated and passing.
